title: Thin Page / Scenario Control System — Authority Dilution Prevention
goal: Stop thin pages from diluting authority without bulk deletion

classification_system.A_supports_money_page: Scenario/tool that directly supports a money page — keep, link to parent
classification_system.B_has_impressions: Has GSC impressions — keep indexable, monitor
classification_system.C_duplicate_thin: Duplicate or thin content — reduce internal links, noindex candidate
classification_system.D_cannibalizes_parent: Competes with parent page for same queries — canonical to parent
classification_system.E_no_value_no_demand: No impressions, no demand, no unique value — cleanup candidate

allowed_actions: reduce internal links pointing to thin variants
add links from useful scenarios to parent calculators
keep parent pages as authority targets

page_counts.scenarios_total: 2,061 (all hash-ID, all noindexed except 2 with GSC impressions)
